APPENDIX OF NON-CALIFORNIA AUTHORITIES IN OPPOSITION TO DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STONE STREET SERVICES, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT SUSTAINS DEFENDANT TRAVELERS CASUALTY AND SURETY COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT WITH 90 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND DUE TO DEFECT OF PARTIES- CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 430.10(D). PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO JOIN AS DEFENDANTS THOSE PARTIES NECESSARY FOR A PROPER ADJUDICATION OF THE CASE AS REQUIRED BY CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 389. COUNSEL FOR THE DEFENDANT TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185
